Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing expert Jim Crowley teaches us how to design and build our own rigs for every freshwater species.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Angler's Workshop
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin takes viewers to the top destinations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks 2024
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Stoked on Fishing crew takes you to the most amazing locations for some epic saltwater action.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best of Saltwater Slam
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim Crowley interviews top anglers and industry insiders from around the world of angling.
Video.grandparentTitle: Slickfish Radio
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows how effective the drop shot can be on Bass during the extreme heat of Summer.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | When its Hot... Drop Shot!.mp4
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.grandparentTitle: Spring Fishing Tips and Tricks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al Lindner and Jeff Klozinski spend the day tracking down postspawn smallmouth.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Finding Transitional Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James Lindner and Jake Wallace spend the day on Lake Vermilion catching smallmouth bass in the shallows on classic tubes.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Shallow Water Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In this exciting episode of FishON!, we hit the legendary Bay of Quinte with none other than Dicki (Richard Sommerville), the ice fishing legend himself. With years of experience and a knack for finding trophy walleye, Dicki helps us navigate the ever-changing ice conditions and put our gear to the test. From early morning setups to heart-pounding battles with giant Quinte gold, this episode is packed with action, expert tips, and stunning winter scenery. Don't miss the ultimate ice fishing adventure!
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte

Image.alt: FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte
FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte
FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte

Video.summary: Join us on an exhilarating journey deep into the heart of Northern Ontario as we tackle mid-summer walleye fishing like never before! Guided by the rising sun, we gear up with our Polaris Ranger to access a remote lake for a day filled with fishing action and good times. Joining the adventure is Mercury Canada Marketing Manager Cameron Racine, adding expertise and excitement to this unforgettable outing. Don't miss the fun, the fish, and the breathtaking scenery!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Northern Adventures: Mid-Summer Walleye Quest with Cameron Racine from Mercury Canada
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Up the Creek
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Up the Creek
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shea McIntee and the crew head down to East Cape, also know as the gem of Baja Mexico and stay at Hotel Buena Vista Beach Resort for the fifth year in a row. After checking in, we head off for some epic tuna and marlin fishing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing — Hot Bite in Baja
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In Episode 3, we navigate the serene waters of the Ivanhoe River, embracing the beauty of spring as we target post-spawn walleye. With rods in hand, we explore the river's productive fishing spots, uncovering the best techniques and tips for a successful catch in this transitional season. From scenic backdrops to thrilling strikes, this episode captures the essence of spring fishing at its finest.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Spring on the Ivanhoe: Post-Spawn Walleye Adventures
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Paul heads out to Lake Huron with some local anglers out of the Spanish Marina
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Big Water Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe Father Son Challenge Part 1
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Father Son Challenge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shea's heads spend another two days fishing in Lake Perris, but this time he's not alone. Fishing with his brother and good friend, they get into Bluegill, Bass, and some big Carp.
Video.grandparentTitle: Flipping and Pitching Lake Perris, CA, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Kim returns to Cheyenne Ridge Signature Lodge on South Dakota's scenic Lake Oahe to target transient post-spawn smallmouth bass. Strike King's "Dream Shot Worm" is the featured lure.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — Roamers at the Ridge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Remote Northern Wilderness, Smallmouth Bass Fishing part 3
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Remote Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Keith Lorensen is no stranger to water, he spent many years at sea during his service in the U.S. Navy. Back in October of 2000, Keith was injured during a terrorist attack on the historic USS Cole.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Navy Veteran Keith Lorensen
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Are you ready to learn how you can catch Giant Mississippi River perch! In this episode you'll have everything you need to know to do it yourself. We also took a trip over to Warrior boats to see how that build their boats. Hang onto your hineys!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | Monster Pre-spawn Perch - Missisippi River
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe Hook Em'
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Hook Em'
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Redfish Lodge
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Redfish Lodge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: We said it last year, and we're going to repeat it this year; Alaska is something special. There's so much nature and beauty here. It's unbelievable. Last week Shea McIntee and the crew had excellent Halibut and Black Bass fishing. This week, mother nature gave us the perfect weather for salmon fishing, and we had a blast. Stoked on Alaska. Here we go!
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked On Fishing
Video.title: Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 3

Image.alt: Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 3
Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 3
Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 3

Video.summary: This week, Larry hits the Mississippi with Adam Christianson from Adrenaline Angling, looking for some monster Perch.
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors | Fall Mississippi Perch Fishing
